name: Satay-Style Beef with Broccoli
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Market steak or beef fillet
recipeInstructions:
1 PLACE THE STEAK IN THE FREEZER for about 20 minutes, or until it is firm to the touch. Cut it against the grain into thin slices.
2 PLACE THE MEAT in a medium-sized bowl with all the marinade ingredients and refrigerate for 20 minutes.
3 SEPARATE THE CHINESE BROCCOLI LEAVES AND STALKS, and cut the leaves into 2-inch pieces.
4 PEEL THE STALKS and cut them into thin, diagonal slices. Wash well in several changes of water.
5 BLANCH THE BROCCOLI for 2 minutes in a large pot of salted, boiling water. Drain well and arrange on a serving platter.
6 HEAT A WOK OR LARGE SKILLET until very hot and add the oil.
7 ADD THE MEAT and stir for 2 minutes. DRAIN THE CONTENTS OF THE WOK INTO A COLANDER SET INSIDE A STAINLESS STEEL BOWL, RESERVING SOME OF THE OIL.
8 RETURN 1 TABLESPOON OF THE DRAINED OIL TO THE WOK AND REHEAT. ADD THE SHRIMP PASTE and 3 TABLESPOONS OF THE CHICKEN STOCK and stir-fry for 30 seconds.
9 ADD THE REMAINING STOCK AND THE REST OF THE SAUCE INGREDIENTS and cook for another 30 seconds.
10 WHEN THE SAUCE HAS THICKENED, RETURN THE MEAT TO THE WOK AND STIR TO MIX WELL. SERVE WITH THE WARM BROCCOLI.
